text:
is an Evangelion unit featured in the EVANGELION x collaboration.

Profile

The design is mostly a painted version of Evangelion Unit-01 with the yellow and red from the fast food chain .

The ankle guard, head armor, chin and the knee brace armor are painted in the manner of a cross section hamburger cut featuring bread, lettuce, meat, cheese and bread again. A complete hamburguer can be seen in the middle of the torso where the core usually is present. The is bigger and cover more area than the regular Unit-01. The torso armor is connected from one part of the chest to another in a single section. The shoulder pylons are colored in the manner of the package of french fries with yellow representing the fried potatoes and the red, the package. The Happy Meal smile is painted in the Evangelion mouth section. The head features the red visor covering the beginning of the horn.

Development

It was first featured in a brand new animated CM promoting the upcoming collaboration on 25 December 2024 https://x.com/McDonaldsJapan/status/1872047167419920837 . 

On 26 December 2024, a character sheet was published in the McDonaldsJapan X (Formerly Twitter) account. https://x.com/McDonaldsJapan/status/1872198163810963543
